rulings.Case Title: DOMENIC J CANNIZZARO et al VS. FRED P RICHARD et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 05, 2014, line 1.DEFENDANT DOMENIC CANNIZZARO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff complied with CCP 762.010 and CCP 762.060. Defendants fail to show that Angelica, Frank or Rosanne "have adverse claims that are of record or known to the plaintiff" in light of 5 and 6 of Amended Judgment entered in case CGC-10-500020 on October 17, 2012 (Plaintiff's RJ Ex. C) and Grant Deed from Roseann to Carmel recorded May 7, 2008 (See Dominic's RJN, EX. A, n). This ruling does not address Angelica, Frank and Roseanne's rights, if any, under CCP 762.050. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN, ALSO KNOWN AS STEVE BROWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-518916, CGC-12-524613, CGC-13-528390 WITH CASE CGC-12-518915
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 05, 2014, line w. PLAINTIFF NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-518916, CGC-12-524613, CGC-13-528390 WITH CASE CGC-12-518915 DENIED. Consolidation is prejudicial to Norman Sable, e.g. CC 51.7 and 52.1 causes of action in Bravo compliant; 2 year gap between Besanceney and Galinsky alleged constructive evictions, etc. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Mtn For An Order Granting Relief From Pltf'S Failure To File A Memo Of Costs On Or Before Dec 9, 2013
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 05, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC's Amended Motion For An Order Granting Relief From Plaintiff's Failure To File A Memo Of Costs On Or Before Dec 9, 2013 GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. THIGDORA BATTE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 05, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted burden. Defendant failed to submit admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. Only judgment for possession is sought. = (501/LKS)
